ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the prize (e.g., Chemistry, Literature, Medicine, Peace) */,
  "prize_name" TEXT /* Name of the prize (e.g., The Nobel Prize in Chemistry 1901) */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation behind the award */,
  "prize_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the prize data */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the prize was awarded */,
  "prize_amount" REAL /* Monetary amount of the prize */,
  "prize_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prize amount is denominated */,
  "prize_status" TEXT /* Status of the prize (e.g., awarded, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the laureate */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* Birth city of the laureate */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Birth country of the laureate */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the laureate (Male/Female) */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the laureate (if applicable) */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* Death city of the laureate (if applicable) */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Death country of the laureate (if applicable) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the laureate */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the laureate's photo */,
  "education" TEXT /* Information about the laureate's educational background */,
  "career_highlights" TEXT /* Key achievements and contributions of the laureate */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study or expertise of the laureate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the laureate (if available) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the laureate's personal or professional website */,
  "is_alive" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the laureate is alive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "organization_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is located */,
  "organization_website" TEXT /* URL to the organization's website */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the organization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the organization is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_types" (
  "laureate_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate type */,
  "laureate_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the laureate type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_prizes" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation behind the award (if applicable) */,
  "award_ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  "award_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "prize_share" REAL /* Share of the prize the laureate received (if shared with others) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id", "prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_organizations" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "association_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the association between the laureate and organization began */,
  "association_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the association ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id", "organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)
